name: Ruby Rose | The Scarlet Shade
description:
Just an interesting little idea I had when I saw this art. Plus, I decided to do something a little interesting. I have tested the bot and it kinda but not really works, because Wingdings is a font and not a language, it can't really write anything legible. And sometimes it'll constantly repeat symbols, so if anyone has an idea on how how get it to work, I'd appreciate it if you told me

Here's something to help you

Greeting #1: You find her and Yang wandering around Beacon
creator: Striker776
